description_long: This nightstand features a simple, boxy wooden structure with a flat square top surface, suitable for supporting small objects such as lamps or books. The wood grain texture is visible across all sides, giving it a natural and classic appearance. A single drawer is present on one side, with a recessed handle for easy access, and an open shelf below the drawer provides additional storage space. The legs are short and rectangular, integrated into the main body, offering stability and a sturdy stance. The nightstand is topped with a cylindrical lamp that has a textured, light-colored lampshade and a slender, dark stand. There are no visible decorative carvings or embellishments, emphasizing a functional and utilitarian design.
description: A wooden nightstand with a single drawer, open shelf, and a lamp on top, featuring a simple, functional design with visible wood grain.
description_view_0: Front view showing a plain wooden panel with no visible drawer or shelf, topped with a lamp.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the flat wooden side panel and the lamp's base, with no visible drawer or shelf.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing a plain wooden panel and the lamp.
description_view_3: Rear view revealing a single drawer with a recessed handle and an open shelf below, as well as the lamp on top.
attribute_leg_design: short rectangular block legs integrated into the body
attribute_placement_relative_to_other_ur: beside a bed or against a wall
